title: Corellia Ho!
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Quote|You must know that tune -- brace up, Corellia, stand firm and tall? None shall subdue you, you'll never fall? Go your own way and let none hold you back, for your future calls you ever ever on-n-n-n-n? No? Well, it's a rouser. I hope you'll deliver my arrangement.|[[Grondorn Muse]]|{{GalaxiesAED}}}} [[File:CorelliaHo.jpg|200px|thumb|"Corellia Ho!", a popular Corellia anthem arranged for a military band by militia officer Grondorn Muse of Bela Vistal.]] "'''Corellia Ho!'''" was a popular [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] anthem frequently played by militia and military bands. ==Lyrics== A well known part of the anthem goes like this: ''Brace up, Corellia, stand firm and tall.
'' ''None shall subdue you, you'll never fall.
'' ''Go your own way and let none hold you back,
'' ''for your future calls you ever ever on-n-n-n-n.
'' ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesAED}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Corellian culture]] [[Category:Patriotic and military songs]]
